changes: Added v6.8.0 docstring comment in frontmatter block
Renamed step 3 header to include 'and usage data'
Added Usage data paragraph under step 3: glob state.json, read pipeline.total_tokens and total_duration_ms, null → em-dash
Updated Issue Table column spec in step 7: added Tokens and Duration columns with em-dash fallback
rationale: Adding two read-only columns (glob state.json, read two integer fields) required no HTML/JS rewrite — the existing table spec is text-driven. Change is purely additive and presentation-only per design.md §3.4 (COST-R6 display).
